name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: Looking for your name on this list, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I know we email a lot, but I only want you to donate when you're comfortable and can spare the change. I pulled your supporter record for you to review here. Give it a look and let me know -----------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, Tim wrote you earlier today because we have a week left to raise the rest of this month's goal.

I know we email a lot, but I only want you to donate when you're comfortable and can spare the change. I pulled your supporter record for you to review here. **Give it a look and let me know if you 'd be able to donate towards our goal today:** | [**NAME:** Derek Willis
**PAST CONTRIBUTION:** Not recorded
**SEPTEMBER DONOR:** Confirm below](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11be/3e0906/70032630/3e366d06/1803942403/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+NAME+NAMEEMAILPAST+CONTRIBUTION++if+cont&utm_campaign=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&source=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd")
---
| [**Yes, I can donate towards the goal this month ->**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11be/3e0906/70032630/3e366d05/1803942403/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Yes+I+can+donate+towards+the+goal+this+m&utm_campaign=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&source=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd")
---
Derek, donations this month make a _huge_ impact. They go directly towards funding our Get Out the Vote program for Tim and every Democratic candidate in Virginia.

**We are at such a critical time. The candidates we support, well, they speak volumes about who we want to be as a country.**

I hope you know that a donation here and there - when your budgeting allows - is what will make sure that in a year from now, we have people in office to vote against the policies and judicial appointments that have begun to push on our moral gag reflex almost daily.

[So if you can chip in this month, please send a donation by following this link.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11be/3e0906/70032630/3e366d04/1803942403/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+So+if+you+can+chip+in+this+month+please+&utm_campaign=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd&source=20180923_2_FR_JN_EOQ-card-nd")

Thanks so much for your support this month and always,

_Jenny Nadicksbernd_
Finance Director

* * *

name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: FW: a special request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The pressure is on to keep our ads up on TV and keep our volunteers knocking doors. Grassroots supporters like you can make my job MUCH easier in one simple way.
Hey there, It's Lindsay, Tom's finance director. I wanted to make sure you saw his note from earlier -- because Tom is right. [**Recurring donations**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") are really helpful to me as I plan out our fundraising goals and manage our budget in the final stretch of this race. This race is getting crazier every day, with a far-right Super PAC boosting Wendy Rogers and Republicans determined to unseat Tom. The pressure is on to keep our ads up on TV and keep our volunteers knocking doors. If I know an extra $100 or $200 is coming in the door every week, thanks to recurring gifts from supporters like you -- it makes my job MUCH easier. [**So, what do you say: Will you help out Tom and me with a recurring donation, so I can make sure we have the resources we need to keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director \-----forwarded message----- From: Tom O'Halleran Subject: a special request I need your help today, friends. This campaign is powered by you -- our community of grassroots supporters. I'm the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and Republican Super PACs are already spending tens of thousands of dollars in our district, trying to unseat me, so I can't win this race alone. **Every grassroots contribution makes a difference in a race this close, but I 'm writing you today with a specific request. There is a special kind of donation that is an especially huge help to my team. These donations, called recurring contributions, repeat once a week through Election Day.** [**Can you help my team prepare for the final 6 weeks of this race -- and keep AZ-01 BLUE this fall -- by making a recurring donation of $10 today?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Recurring donations help give my team a better sense of how much money we have to spend every week. So, for example, if you make a recurring donation of $20, my finance director Lindsay can budget for $20 coming in the door every week. That's a big help, because she knows she won't come up short if she needs to print more yard signs or more walk packets for our volunteers. [**Could you help Lindsay and me out with a recurring donation today?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [**I 'll chip in $10 a week until Election Day >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [**Actually, I 'll chip in more >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.23_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f0e/1a8421e1/1a5da5972/492c331d/4141506611/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f0e/1a8421e1/1a5da5972/492c331e/4141506611/VEsHBA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f0e/1a8421e1/1a5da5972/492c331f/4141506611/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

body:

| Friends:

If you live in Hot Springs or the surrounding areas, please make plans to join us this Saturday at the Hayden for Congress Headquarters in Hot Springs at 320 Ouachita Avenue at 9:00 a.m. for an old fashioned canvassing event!

We will split into teams of two and three and knock on doors in the city limits to let people know about Hayden and the other great local candidates on the ballot this year. We'll also be sharing information about transportation to the polls for those who need it.

We now have 43 days until the midterm elections. The clock is ticking. We need your help - whatever that may be - whether it's knocking on doors, making phone calls, addressing postcards, or donating money - our country needs you now more than ever.

We can't wait to see you this Saturday at 9:00!

The Hayden for Congress Team

name: Bob Fertik and Heidi Sieck
subject: We Believe ALL The Women
body:
Dear Activist,

Dr. Christine Blasey Ford bravely decided to testify in the Senate this Thursday - despite death threats that forced her to relocate her family for safety.

And she may not be alone. Deborah Ramirez, a Yale classmate, has now reported a sexual assault at a drunken fraternity party (https://www.newyorker.com/news/news-desk/senate-democrats-investigate-a-new-allegation-of-sexual-misconduct-from-the-supreme-court-nominee-brett-kavanaughs-college-years-deborah-ramirez) . And attorney Michael Avenatti informed the Senate that multiple witnesses are prepared to testify that Kavanaugh targeted women with alcohol and drugs for gang rapes (https://twitter.com/MichaelAvenatti/status/1044032678951960576) .

Republican Senators have already made up their mind to ignore Dr. Ford and the other women. Mitch McConnell grotesquely declared, "We're going to plow right through it (https://www.washingtonpost.com/video/politics/were-going-to-plow-right-through-it-mcconnell-says-on-kavanaugh-nomination/2018/09/21/39beef50-bdac-11e8-8243-f3ae9c99658a_video.html?utm_term=.22ffa1dcf96b) ."

Women and men across the U.S. need to show our support for all the women who are risking everything to hold Brett Kavanaugh accountable for his sexual assaults. Here's how:

1. Monday 1pm ET / 10am PT: National Walkout and Moment of Solidarity (https://www.facebook.com/events/2132578240149628/)

Join #MeToo leader Tarana Burke (https://twitter.com/TaranaBurke/status/1043479006316642304) , along with anti-violence and survivor-led groups, to show support for Dr. Blasey Ford and all survivors of sexual violence. Wear the color black and walk out (of your home, workplace, classroom, wherever you are) -- and capture it with a selfie to post on social media with the hashtag #BelieveSurvivors.

(http://www.facebook.com/events/2132578240149628/)

2. Thursday 12pm your time: National Solidarity Speakout: We #BelieveChristine (https://actionnetwork.org/event_campaigns/webelievechristine)

Dr. Blasey Ford is scheduled to testify before the Senate Judiciary Committee about her attempted rape on Thursday. That same day, on Thursday, September 27, survivors will gather at their Senators’ offices across the country and share their own testimonies of assault. They will #HearOurVoice.

Find an action near you here (https://actionnetwork.org/event_campaigns/webelievechristine) . If you don’t see one listed in your area, create your own! Wear black and write “I BELIEVE” on your hands in marker. Bring a letter asking your Senator to vote NO on Kavanaugh - print this sample letter (https://download.canva.com/DADEBupcV3w/35/custom-37011206.pdf?response-content-disposition=attachment%3B%20filename%2A%3DUTF-8%27%27Dear%2520Senator%2520-%2520Letter.pdf&response-expires=Sun%2C%2023%20Sep%202018%2000%3A15%3A10%20GMT&AWSAccessKeyId=AKIAJHKNGJLC2J7OGJ6Q&Expires=1537661710&Signature=PozG8Lqou47AbBcim8yDqmWTPGY%3D) or write your own.

3. Support the "We Believe All the Women (http://bitly.com/webelievedrblaseyford) " GoFundMe campaign:

We cannot repeat the 1991 Anita Hill disaster that set women back for years. We can’t allow Dr. Christine Blasey Ford be demeaned or discredited for telling her story. A coalition of organizations and activists gathered in coalition to support her against vicious and vile attacks on her character. Now there are more women. We must all assist these courageous women with their legal and security expenses. All funds raised will go directly to the women pursuant to their instructions. This is a tangible way to support. Please help if you can.

(http://bitly.com/webelievedrblaseyford)

4. Watch live broadcasts of these and other protests by act.tv (http://act.tv) on Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/actdottv) , Twitter (http://twitter.com/actdottv) , and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/actdottv/) .

(http://www.facebook.com/actdottv)

Thanks for all you do!

Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
Heidi Sieck, #VOTEPROCHOICE

https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDIwLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjQ1NzE5MzMx

clean_body: Dear Activist, Dr. Christine Blasey Ford bravely decided to testify in the Senate this Thursday - despite death threats that forced her to relocate her family for safety. And she may not be alone. Deborah Ramirez, a Yale classmate, has now reported a sexual assault at a drunken fraternity party () . And attorney Michael Avenatti informed the Senate that multiple witnesses are prepared to testify that Kavanaugh targeted women with alcohol and drugs for gang rapes () . Republican Senators have already made up their mind to ignore Dr. Ford and the other women. Mitch McConnell grotesquely declared, "We're going to plow right through it () ." Women and men across the U.S. need to show our support for all the women who are risking everything to hold Brett Kavanaugh accountable for his sexual assaults. Here's how: 1. Monday 1pm ET / 10am PT: National Walkout and Moment of Solidarity () Join #MeToo leader Tarana Burke () , along with anti-violence and survivor-led groups, to show support for Dr. Blasey Ford and all survivors of sexual violence. Wear the color black and walk out (of your home, workplace, classroom, wherever you are) -- and capture it with a selfie to post on social media with the hashtag #BelieveSurvivors. () 2. Thursday 12pm your time: National Solidarity Speakout: We #BelieveChristine () Dr. Blasey Ford is scheduled to testify before the Senate Judiciary Committee about her attempted rape on Thursday. That same day, on Thursday, September 27, survivors will gather at their Senators’ offices across the country and share their own testimonies of assault. They will #HearOurVoice. Find an action near you here () . If you don’t see one listed in your area, create your own! Wear black and write “I BELIEVE” on your hands in marker. Bring a letter asking your Senator to vote NO on Kavanaugh - print this sample letter () or write your own. 3. Support the "We Believe All the Women () " GoFundMe campaign: We cannot repeat the 1991 Anita Hill disaster that set women back for years. We can’t allow Dr. Christine Blasey Ford be demeaned or discredited for telling her story. A coalition of organizations and activists gathered in coalition to support her against vicious and vile attacks on her character. Now there are more women. We must all assist these courageous women with their legal and security expenses. All funds raised will go directly to the women pursuant to their instructions. This is a tangible way to support. Please help if you can. () 4. Watch live broadcasts of these and other protests by act.tv () on Facebook () , Twitter () , and Instagram () . () Thanks for all you do! subject: President Trump to UN: “We Commit to Fighting the Drug Epidemic Together”
body:
| |

#
# _President Trump to UN: “We Commit to Fighting the Drug Epidemic Together”_
“President Donald Trump in his address at a high-level meeting on the ‘Global Call to Action on the World Drug Problem,’ said that the United States is committed to ‘fighting the drug epidemic together,’” CBS News reports this morning. “The call is simple,” the President said. “Reduce drug demand, cut off the supply of illicit drugs, expand treatment and straighten international cooperation. If we take these steps together, we can save the lives of countless people in all corners of the world.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-delivers-remarks-united-nations-counter-narcotics-drugs-live-stream-2018-09-24/) In the [**_New York Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://nypost.com/2018/09/20/trumps-iran-sanctions-prove-the-establishment-wrong-again/), Jonathan Tobin writes that President Trump’s Iran sanctions are working—something the establishment critics once again got wrong. “The success of oil sanctions should not only encourage the United States to push Tehran harder. It’s also one more reason to ignore the so-called experts’ contempt for Trump’s unconventional but clearly spot-on approach to the region.” “Secretary of State Mike Pompeo reaffirmed Friday that the Trump administration is committed to religious liberty, both at home and abroad,” Fred Lucas writes in [**_The Daily Signal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/21/promoting-religious-liberty-affirms-human-dignity-pompeo-tells-values-voter-summit/). “We are assuring human dignity by advancing one of our most cherished, indispensable liberties, enshrined in the First Amendment. It is our religious liberty,” Secretary Pompeo said. This weekend, President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence laid out the case for how their Administration has revived the American economy, Allison Elyse Gualtieri reports for the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/trump-pence-combine-for-one-two-tweet-punch-on-booming-economy). “This economy isn't booming because of President Obama's policies — it's booming because we've been rolling back the failed policies of his administration since day one," the Vice President tweeted.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI0Ljk1MjY4MDkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNC45NTI2ODA5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5NzY1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

subject: One month until early voting! Make sure you're registered!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
It's **ONE MONTH** until Early Voting begins for the General Election and with so much at stake, we need you to be sure you're _**registered to vote!**_
**Click below to check your voter registration or register to vote if you aren't already! **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2308579/12521399/-1540466942?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmQ3MjJjMy0xM2MwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjQUtg49Dqqxm9aEW7ZcWyOJLMoz7GdWdNYV9N_AWrA=)
Already registered? Are your friends and family? [Help them get regsitered to vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2308580/12521400/-1540466942?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmQ3MjJjMy0xM2MwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjQUtg49Dqqxm9aEW7ZcWyOJLMoz7GdWdNYV9N_AWrA=) so that we can stop the attack on our health care, our jobs, and our education. Now, more than ever we need to speak up and stand up for ourselves, our families and fellow West Virginians.
Make SURE you are registered to vote, if not it's a **[click](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2308581/12521402/-1540466942?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmQ3MjJjMy0xM2MwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjQUtg49Dqqxm9aEW7ZcWyOJLMoz7GdWdNYV9N_AWrA=)** away. The last day to register to vote in the General Election is**October 16, 2018.**

**2018 Election Dates**
**Last Day to Register to Vote: October 16**
**Early Voting: October 24 - November 3**
**General Election Day: November 6**

name: Wendy H. [Press Secretary]
subject: Our New Ad: Build a Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
No matter where you live, Minnesotans across our state are working to build a future for themselves and their families.
Today we released our newest ad about the work that Amy is doing in the United States Senate to make sure that everyone can find a path to success and **_[we wanted to make sure you saw it first!](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WYb9bLUDn%2Ff2xhxWuncQRGgskwQ%2FVd74)_**_[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=OYNb%2FVeUweLiOv8xvb7oF2gskwQ%2FVd74)_
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s%2F28J1ReQwm9OgJzV5ZAm2gskwQ%2FVd74)
---
One key to a strong economy for the middle class is having a skilled workforce ready to take on in-demand jobs. That's why Senator Klobuchar is working to expand programs for skills training and apprenticeships so that everyone can make a decent living and build a future -- college or not.
**Please share our new ad with your friends and family, and help us spread the word about the great work Amy is doing to help _all_ Minnesotans Build a Future.**
Thanks,
Wendy H.
[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Sg3xqSFrNmrqtHSe6p5Ky2gskwQ%2FVd74)
---

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=R6lk7YN0VnadtkZ%2Bx%2F7%2B42gskwQ%2FVd74)

****
****
****
****
****
**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the email list, please click here.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fcos57N6YcolgN70iHq07GgskwQ%2FVd74)
P.O. Box 4146, Saint Paul, MN 55104

While Democrats are pledging to erase America's borders and let MS-13 run wild, I'm asking you to pledge to vote Republican this November.

_Please sign the pledge by 11:59 PM tonight to get on the list of supporters who pledge to show up in November and elect MORE ALLIES of our patriotic America First agenda._

Your pledge will let me know just how many conservatives are committed to showing up to vote for MORE allies of our agenda -- _and so that I can show CNN the next time they tell me about the so-called "blue wave."_

I don't see a blue wave happening. All I see is a bankrupt political party led by Nancy Pelosi, disgraced James Comey, and a mob of open borders socialists.

**But I 'm reminded that history is not on our side.** The incumbent president's party usually takes a hit during the midterms.

That's because presidents get complacent. They lose energy. They forget about their diehard supporters who poured their hearts and souls into winning.
...I WILL NEVER FORGET ABOUT YOU.
You elected me to Make America Great Again! **That is a pledge I will never walk away from.** Every time I'm obstructed, I only get more motivated to fight back. I will work all hours of the night until you get the agenda you voted for.

**[But now I need you to pledge to show up in November and elect MORE ALLIES of our patriotic America First agenda.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f07be29703247cf86b98e580759b2591e434a740f9e7ab0d49e5c3302c71a6931e97c57c6fc352e5f13ed42f6cedf62c5c6a14aeedcd2c89)**

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Our final end-of-quarter FEC goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I’ll get right to it: we need to raise $5 million online before midnight
on September 30 -- which is when we’ll close the books on the final
quarterly FEC fundraising filing of this campaign.

Falling short of this goal is just not an option if we want to pull off a
historic victory for this state and this country. Whether we reach this
goal will determine where our campaign is able to spend critical resources
in the final few weeks before Election Day. Whether we’ll be able to
compete in all 254 counties, all 20 media markets across the state.

Our filing will also signal just how strong we are to Ted Cruz and the
super PACs and special interests in his corner. They’re set to pour even
more dark money into Texas to tip the scales. And they’re not going to run
out of resources. So we either have to outpace them or risk losing the
momentum we’ve worked so hard to secure.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180924-img&t=1001&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK ]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180924&t=1020&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK ]I’m counting on you to step up
to help Beto reach the final FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign.
Pitch in a contribution of
$3
right now.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180924&t=1021&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK ]Contribute
$3
»

Obviously, this goal is very steep. It’s steeper than any other goal we’ve
set before. But I want to remind you of a few things:

When Ted Cruz dropped his first negative ads attacking Beto and our
campaign in July, this is the team that raised over $1.2 million from
grassroots donations in just three days.

But most importantly, when everyone said that Beto couldn’t travel to all
254 counties in Texas,

Or that Beto didn’t stand a chance without taking a dime from PACs or
special interests,

Or that Beto would get crushed by Ted Cruz and the national dark-money
infrastructure Cruz built during his failed campaign for President,

This is the team that stood up, fought back and worked harder than ever --
against all odds -- to bring this race within single digits.

This is the team that’s redefined what’s possible. This is the team that’s
going to hit our final quarterly FEC goal. And this is the team that’s
going to win in November.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180924&t=1022&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK ]Help Beto reach our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising goal of
raising $5 million by midnight on September 30 with
a donation of
$3
today. It’s going to take each and every single one of us.

We’re so close -- the finish line is within reach -- but we’re going to
have to really hustle to pull this all off.

Adelante,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180924&t=1023&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180924footer&t=1024&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=12572%2E444211%2EvrIzeK

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Steve Schultz
subject: It's Debbie's birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Hi, It's Debbie's birthday on September 27th, and our family wants to surprise her with something special. We were hoping that you could help us with her birthday card. [**We 're aiming to get 2,700 signatures by the 27th to celebrate Debbie's birthday -- can you sign our card if you've got a minute?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca8/622b7b5b/1cc539ac/307b6ceb/1300610529/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180924") We know that you have Debbie's back. But I still think it would be a great gift for Debbie to let her know that all of you are fighting by her side. So, this birthday card with 2,700 signatures on it will really make this day special. [**Sign Debbie 's birthday card, and help us wish a happy birthday to the best wife, mother, and friend anyone could ask for.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca8/622b7b5b/1cc539ac/307b6ceb/1300610529/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180924") Thanks, Steve

name: Vice President Walter Mondale
subject: A message about my friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Can you help me out for a second?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180924_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Standing up to Big Pharma. Speaking out against dark money in our elections. Tackling the opioid crisis. Fighting to restore net neutrality. Tina has been a champion for us in the Senate. I know what it's like to fight the big battles in the Senate, and if there's one thing I know about Tina -- she's just getting started. That's why we need her in the Senate: so she can keep standing up to big money interests and fighting for ALL Minnesotans. **[But here's the honest truth: Republicans are desperate to flip control of this Senate seat (Donald Trump lost Minnesota by just 1.5%). They will do anything to defeat Tina and win this Senate special election. We can't let that happen. The only way Democrats can take back the Senate is if we win this special election in Minnesota. Will you chip in $3 before her big end-of-quarter deadline in 5 days?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180924_em&amount=3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d7e6/c1f7015/6d2f4847/114125d0/289982196/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180924_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d7e6/c1f7015/6d2f4847/114125d5/289982196/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180924_em-exp&amount=25")
---
Tina wasted no time standing up to the big pharmaceutical companies and their army of lobbyists. Her first bill took steps to help lower the cost of prescription drugs by ending an unfair practice that giant drug companies use to game the system and keep more affordable generic drugs off the market.
That's ridiculous, right? Tina thought so, too, and decided it was about time someone did something about it. **That probably didn't make Big Pharma too happy, but that's the kind of person Tina is. She fights for us -- not them.**
But in order for Tina to keep fighting for us and our progressive values in the Senate, we need to have her back before this important deadline. Can you help me do that?
**[_POLITICO_ named this one of the five races that could decide the fate of the Senate -- so the road to a Democratic majority goes straight through Minnesota. Can you chip in $3 before her end-of-quarter deadline and make sure we keep this Senate seat blue? There's no time to waste.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180924_em&amount=3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for your help,
Former Vice President Walter Mondale

name: Josh Hawley
subject: A conversation I had with the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Everywhere we go, we can feel a real momentum and excitement with everyone we talk to. Backstage at the rally on Friday, I had a few minutes to talk to the President about how the campaign is going.

I told him all of the good news. Everywhere we go, we can feel a real momentum and excitement with everyone we talk to.

He listened carefully and then gave me his advice: "You cannot let up. No matter how well you think it is going, you have to remember how desperate Claire McCaskill and Chuck Schumer are to win this race - _**they will do anything**_."

Mr. President, you are right again. We cannot let up in this race. We need to keep fighting. [ I'm in! Donate now ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4b7053e5fbd24534b92cb43014810dc4&_e=8nTY2Ic8_COMr7F_3KKuXtZUK5X1mNG0SM1jdrXLpnQrANgcp5e-6iKh-fUiLsRAvCxCz7DK2Njb0_6QTvr42bvzsC_eZ6W65cskbgulc5WXFnwsJqZHa9CW3x2kf5PlEUcPNbzv6-EX5q3tDct4waZ6oeKtpHL45tU8sAjgTBofPZ0EoYmSEbB26oiRB52dTbK5l15-G4PPKI7qij5l8o_352DLSfK2yMDKp37UwfCARTetApo2HSypUdp6Ldb_TOm9TekllsSU5O0pcZFw-xcQWR1aMt5VPVHpKUYXrXXjI-BzDOd56Q7FKeBb-cerdWcBs0fqviqa-_mdv0sYAhFNhnwtfRwZj6fvOtZzY1kQ3IErWzvagWd00D-WHhVfoedy86akE59osaSoWGxtTQ%3D%3D) Our last financial quarter is coming up at the end of this week, and I set an ambitious goal for my team. clean_body: Everywhere we go, we can feel a real momentum and excitement with everyone we talk to. Backstage at the rally on Friday, I had a few minutes to talk to the President about how the campaign is going. I told him all of the good news. Everywhere we go, we can feel a real momentum and excitement with everyone we talk to. He listened carefully and then gave me his advice: "You cannot let up. No matter how well you think it is going, you have to remember how desperate Claire McCaskill and Chuck Schumer are to win this race - they will do anything." Mr. President, you are right again. We cannot let up in this race. We need to keep fighting. Our last financial quarter is coming up at the end of this week, and I set an ambitious goal for my team. We cannot let up on our effort to win. Chuck Schumer will do everything in his power to save the rubber stamp vote he has in Claire McCaskill. After this month, it’s October, and the election will be here before we know it. I need your help making this final quarterly report before the election the strongest one we’ve ever had. We are getting close to our goal, and with your support, I know we can meet and even exceed it. If you haven’t had the chance to donate, please click the button below and give before September is over. For Missouri, Josh Hawley Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: We can't afford to overlook this threat.
body:
Peter,
We must recognize the obvious. Most Americans don’t know every candidate on their ballot.
I’ve traveled the country and talked with tens of thousands of voters over my career and I can tell you it’s extremely rare for a voter to know every name on their ballot.
Now don’t get me wrong. Some Americans have done their homework. They do know every candidate they are going to vote for—from dogcatcher to U.S. Senate.
However, millions plan to vote but just aren’t informed. When they’re at the ballot box, they’re more likely to pull a name out of a hat based on how it sounds or what it rhymes with rather than match their values to the best representatives.
That strategy may work on school exams **but in politics, ignorance at the ballot box could be the biggest threat to our country come November 6th.**
Our effort to reach millions of Christians to vote is well underway—**but much remains to be done.**
**Millions might commit to vote—but if faith voters don’t know the _who’s_ and _what’s_ on the ballot, then we will have only done half of our job. Christians will be engaged but not equipped.**
Ignorance is a disease in our nation today, and the most effective antidote is relevant information. Thomas Jefferson, once said:
_“If a nation expects to be ignorant and free, in a state of civilization, it expects what never was and never will be.”_
You may already know who you are going to vote for as Senator and U.S. House Representative. But what of the state legislature, judicial nominees or school board seats?
The last thing we want to see happen is Christians entering the ballot box unprepared. Critical issues important to our faith – the protection for the unborn and defending religious liberty in the public square - will be decided in _this election_ at the state and federal level.
**Faith voters need to do their homework. Will you help us equip them with the right tools to cast values-based votes?**
* My Faith Votes is working to provide every faith voter in America (regardless of state, city, or town) with access to a full electronic sample ballot. **Believe it or not, no one else is doing this on a national scale!**
* This tool also summarizes from each candidate’s website his or her stance on important issues such as Abortion, Immigration, and Education.
* We’ve already set up this tool in a bold step of faith—but we still need your help to fund this effort. At a cost of just $800 per state, together we can raise the $40,000 required to fully fund this effort and deploy this powerful tool.

This election will have generational ramifications—it is far too important to leave up to guesswork.
**[Thanks to a generous matching grant, every dollar you give up to $20,000 will be matched dollar-for-dollar](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180924apl01nd&n=1).**
**[Please help us equip fellow believers with this critical information before November by making your best donation today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180924apl01nd&n=2).**
Especially when history’s in the balance. Issues of religious liberty, the sanctity of life, marriage, and family are all at stake.
We _can_ protect Christian values in America if faith voters do their homework and make informed votes. We need your help to make this happen.
Rhymes and nice-sounding names work in Nashville or Hollywood—but values sound best at the ballot box.
I’m counting on you to help reach and equip faith voters across the country!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180924apl01nd&n=3)
God Bless.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180924apl01nd&n=4)

**P.S.** Faith voters need to be informed of the _who_ and _what_ on their ballots _before_ casting their votes. I hope you will join me in helping to defend our country against the grip of ignorance by equipping faith voters this election—with this essential voting tool.
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180924apl01nd&n=5).
clean_body: Peter, We must recognize the obvious. Most Americans don’t know every candidate on their ballot. I’ve traveled the country and talked with tens of thousands of voters over my career and I can tell you it’s extremely rare for a voter to know every name on their ballot. Now don’t get me wrong. Some Americans have done their homework. They do know every candidate they are going to vote for—from dogcatcher to U.S. Senate. However, millions plan to vote but just aren’t informed. When they’re at the ballot box, they’re more likely to pull a name out of a hat based on how it sounds or what it rhymes with rather than match their values to the best representatives. That strategy may work on school exams but in politics, ignorance at the ballot box could be the biggest threat to our country come November 6th. Our effort to reach millions of Christians to vote is well underway—but much remains to be done. Millions might commit to vote—but if faith voters don’t know the who’s and what’s on the ballot, then we will have only done half of our job. Christians will be engaged but not equipped. Ignorance is a disease in our nation today, and the most effective antidote is relevant information. Thomas Jefferson, once said: “If a nation expects to be ignorant and free, in a state of civilization, it expects what never was and never will be.” You may already know who you are going to vote for as Senator and U.S. House Representative. But what of the state legislature, judicial nominees or school board seats? The last thing we want to see happen is Christians entering the ballot box unprepared. Critical issues important to our faith – the protection for the unborn and defending religious liberty in the public square - will be decided in this election at the state and federal level. Faith voters need to do their homework. Will you help us equip them with the right tools to cast values-based votes? My Faith Votes is working to provide every faith voter in America (regardless of state, city, or town) with access to a full electronic sample ballot. Believe it or not, no one else is doing this on a national scale! This tool also summarizes from each candidate’s website his or her stance on important issues such as Abortion, Immigration, and Education. We’ve already set up this tool in a bold step of faith—but we still need your help to fund this effort. At a cost of just $800 per state, together we can raise the $40,000 required to fully fund this effort and deploy this powerful tool. This election will have generational ramifications—it is far too important to leave up to guesswork. . . Especially when history’s in the balance. Issues of religious liberty, the sanctity of life, marriage, and family are all at stake. We can protect Christian values in America if faith voters do their homework and make informed votes. We need your help to make this happen. Rhymes and nice-sounding names work in Nashville or Hollywood—but values sound best at the ballot box. I’m counting on you to help reach and equip faith voters across the country! God Bless. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman P.S.** Faith voters need to be informed of the who and what on their ballots before casting their votes. I hope you will join me in helping to defend our country against the grip of ignorance by equipping faith voters this election—with this essential voting tool. ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

subject: I have a case of the Mondays (please help?)

body:
| | Hi Derek -

I was wondering if you had a chance to see the campaign's emails in your inbox yesterday? We still have _that big deadline_ coming up and today is **the _last_ Monday before the _last_ end of quarter deadline for the _entire_ 2018 election cycle** \- that means your donations matter more than ever, since it's our last week to raise funds that will soon be public for everyone to see. It would mean a whole lot to Tim and the entire team if y'all could brighten up [this dreary Monday morning](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f7f/1600668799/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+this+dreary+Monday+morning&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD") by helping us inch a little closer to that big $100,000 goal. | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f7e/1600668799/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD")

Thanks for taking a minute to read,

_Jessalyn - Digital Director_

P.S. Numbers update, if you're interested in the nitty gritty - we're down to $84,200 to go! I know it seems like a huge number, but $5 here or there really does chip away at it. [Click here to make a little dent on this number if you can.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f7d/1600668799/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+make+a+little+dent+on+this&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD")

* * *

FROM: Tim Kaine
SUBJECT: I've been a little busy lately
I've been spending my September either out in Virginia meeting with folks or in the Senate fighting what I believe could turn out to be some of the most defining battles of our time. **Supreme Court confirmations are our constitutional duty and should not be taken lightly or rushed.**

As of today, we have one week left of September, one week left to hit our goal, and one week until the books close on our third quarter numbers. After that, the numbers go public, and we are sprinting to the end to win in November and elect our Democratic congressional candidates here in Virginia.

To get there, we set ambitious fundraising goals. Here's where we stand: We have exactly one week to raise $100,000.

**So I 'm asking for a little help from you to make sure we hit this goal. Can you chip in for the month of September? Sure would mean a lot to me. [If you can donate today, click here and let me know.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f7c/1600668799/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+If+you+can+donate+today+click+here+and+l&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD")**

Derek, if you can help out in the next week -- whether it's for the first time all year, the first time this week, or maybe it's even the fifth time! -- I would sure appreciate it. Click the link below to contribute to my re-election to the Senate and to support the whole Virginia Democratic ticket:

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f73/1600668799/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD")

Talk soon,

_Tim_

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ba/3e0906/701314c3/3e366f72/1600668799/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD&source=20180924_1_FR_JR_TK-FWD")

name: Team Mel
subject: Can we count you in for Sept. 30?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Team,

Did you see Mel's message about our final fundraising event? We're looking at the numbers now, and we still need another 33 people to register if we want this event to be a success. If we don't fill this event up to capacity, we simply won't have the resources it takes to win this race and send a fighter for hardworking Hoosiers to Congress.

Can Mel count on you to join us in South Bend? Read his note below, then [**RSVP for our last fundraising event of the campaign!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/JHqD0nnAXK0r-xpLfwrByoDJKCareigOKy3u6i_Cq5g=)

Team Mel

**\-- ORIGINAL MESSAGE FROM MEL HALL --**

Friend,

As we move into the final days of our campaign to get Congress working for Hoosiers again, we're hosting our last fundraising event on Sunday, September 30th in South Bend. I wanted to extend a personal invitation for you to join us, but first, let me tell you why this event is so important to our victory in November.

I am relying on supporters like you to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race. I'm not taking any money from corporate PACs, because the only people I'll be accountable to in Congress are the people of Indiana who need a champion fighting for them in the halls of power. This final fundraising event is our last opportunity to ensure we can take this campaign all the way and finally give the people of this district the representation they deserve.

[_**If you 're ready to be a part of this movement, don't miss out on our final fundraising event. RSVP now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/JHqD0nnAXK0r-xpLfwrByoDJKCareigOKy3u6i_Cq5g=)

I hope to see you there,

Mel

**Please Join**

**Sponsors:**
Kathleen and Mark Neal, Gail and Joe Mancini, Anne and Rick Morgan, Parker Beauchamp, Kim and Jim Betz, Jan and Andy Beutter, Virginia and Richmond Calvin, Paul Cholis, Myrtie and Lynn Coleman, Marghi and Kyle Copelin, Kim Brazo and Larry Davis, Rick Doolittle, Michelle and Alan Engel, Susan and Tom Fischbach, Ed Foley, Jody and Michael Freid, Cindi and Tom Fuja, Matthew Hall, Nathan Hall, Tonja and Max Hall, Mary and Al Harding, Mary and Bruce Jones, Marijo and Kevin Kelly, Carol and Jim Groves, Greta and Jay Lewis, Eileen and Mike Lindburg, Peter Mullen, Nell Newton, Bhumika and Ben Norris, David Nufer, Jim and Nancy Olson, Jennifer and Frank Perri, Laura Pflum, Kris Priemer, Mary Ann and Randy Rompola, Nancy and Doug Sakaguchi, WaiMun and Steve Spilger, Pam and Jeff Stesiak, Sue and Stephen Studer, Jill Long and Don Thompson

**Hosts:**
Carol and Spike Abernethy, John and Margie Anella, Jim Aranowski, Kathleen Kennedy and John Borkowski, Bruce Carter, Dolores and Don Galbreath, Traci Gammage, Al Hogan, Katie Humphreys and Ralph Komasinski, Jan and Marty Oosterbaan, Charlee and Gary Pippenger, Reuben Rutland, Molly and Ed Sullivan, Janet and Larry Thompson, Jacqui Walton

**For a final reception with**

Democratic Candidate for Congress (IN-02)

Sunday, September 30th
2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

101 N. Michigan St.
South Bend, IN 46601

Sponsor: $1,000
Host: $500
Friend: $250

Pre-registration is highly encouraged as space is limited.
[**_Pre-Register Here._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/JHqD0nnAXK0r-xpLfwrByoDJKCareigOKy3u6i_Cq5g=)

Send any questions to [Saralena@melforcongress.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/GE7X9hjX3OYnliVTWZFRr4pvlDJFNxu55RtiyKsTds8=)

[Sounds great! See you there.](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/JHqD0nnAXK0r-xpLfwrByoDJKCareigOKy3u6i_Cq5g=)
[I can't attend, but I will donate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/COS3iEaKNRegYWSc2VETShzCmtVtRQt_qBupE0NflkY=/0ekmBVhcCUI7iafpOnMH32Dl8j9AJFY3fZMAIdsc3wE=?refcode=em180924)

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: What They Are Saying!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
"A new poll shows Democratic U.S. Sen. Robert Menendez trailing Republican challenger Bob Hugin by 10 percentage points." ─ NJ.com (09/20/18) | |
---
_**"A new poll shows Democratic U.S. Sen. Robert Menendez trailing Republican challenger Bob Hugin by 10 percentage points." ─**_ NJ.com (09/20/18)
**RIPPED FROM THE HEADLINES**
* The Huffington Post | For Democrats To Flip The Senate, The N.J. Race Shouldn’t Be In Doubt. But It Is.
* Real Clear Politics | Menendez in Jeopardy as Senate Challenger Makes Push

* NJ.com | Does this South Jersey poll spell trouble for Menendez?

* The Jewish Link New Jersey | Hugin Presents Serious Challenge to Menendez for US Senate
* NorthJersey.com | NJ Senate race: Bob Menendez trailing Bob Hugin in South Jersey House district, poll says
* Politico | The Longshots: 5 unlikely races that could tip the Senate

|
---
|
---
|
---
"The New Jersey Senate race was supposed to be a done deal with incumbent Bob Menendez easily cruising to re-election...But someone forgot to tell New Jersey voters that this race was uncompetitive. The polls show it to be tight -- Menendez simply has not shaken Republican challenger Bob Hugin in a state Hillary Clinton carried by 14 points over Donald Trump two years ago." (Real Clear Politics, [**Menendez in Jeopardy as Senate Challenger Makes Push**](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=132fdcd7fdcc46c6bcf1ff59ef334f31&_e=dlXpykOwSATRKn7nAJRTYN361woBKJzAk4LZELfH8P3cCe9IigSnXwsaOZg3njrQIaAiaJ2JD7mBA1jvX5r9nJAZxADFCCxuzWEqM47foIHmODsLxboj8518ppClSfVRVPuSnAItxcggJXDo_mgzzoOA2V3HEUfhP0qOjo2dZnwx5Efa5r2EdS8AONu_sSz2TsF6zPBpQlibok3wckjGxR3HShgvfQNjyji8SjS2EFqhLztp_TwSmL1DqSzX9sP7YNV_pCpGTTKz4aYXKiAWuTGU9fIa7lTojTTr7N8G2WU1BOPE5SDh1ArpVO9VqXKXAejRfSKllKNAio9DqhkP8Xd_o7Od5t1rv8y8NlUewmXaQMcWgg_JGbak8iRGl96_rFmWQqXrQFDZcPGcXPlnM2yLMzTL31f-QarTh7Iay01buJk5l1ynGPgE1xl2H3l8fxQGkCQVfl54j--dSQ2ABYF4xA6AeITVNhBlyYcsR_Q%3D), 09/21/18)
|
---
|
---
|
---
"If Democrats have any chance of winning the Senate in November’s elections, they need to focus their time and energy on flipping traditionally safe GOP seats ... What they shouldn’t be doing is worrying about a deep blue state like New Jersey, where Sen. Bob Menendez (D-N.J.) seeks his third term. But Menendez, whose political career in the Garden State began when he won a school board race at age 20 in 1974, could be in trouble." (Huffington Post, [**For Democrats To Flip The Senate, The N.J. name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Gasper on WPAFB: "It’s never going to close. Unless somebody blows it up.”
body:
| | | | | | [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=965555&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fmiketurner.com)
---
| | | | **Gasper on Wright-Patterson Air Force Base: "It’s never going to close. Unless somebody blows it up.”**
---
| | | | | [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=965555&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FqK6Yfu0ipR8)
---
| | | | Theresa Gasper said last week that Wright-Patterson Air Force Base is "an enduring base, it’s never going to close, unless somebody blows it up." This is an incredibly irresponsible statement. This is offensive not only to people who work at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, but to every man and woman who works on a base across our country. It shows that my opponent is not qualified to be a candidate for Congress and certainly not qualified to serve in Congress. - Mike

name: Team Scholten
subject: Steve King officially responds in writing to debate challenge!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
It took two weeks, but we finally have a response to our debate challenge in writing from Steve King’s campaign. Below is an exchange that was captured by King’s own campaign team and then posted to his official campaign Facebook page...
Peter,
Steve King doesn't do public appearances, he won't hold Town Halls, he refuses to participate in debates, and he’s absent from the Farm Bill Conference Committee. His treats his job with the same level of respect that he shows the people of this district:** "Meh."**
In contrast, J.D. Scholten holds public appearances every day and, to show how a representative should be available to the people, J.D. is currently in the midst of a 39 county, 39 Town Hall tour (his third 39-county tour of the district). The tour is called, "_You Can't Fake Showing Up._ " You deserve to have representatives that work as hard as you do. [**_Show your support for J.D. with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2313373/12558253/-1618698251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA5Y2FjZS0zNmMwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkBXjAVwlHyN2mZIeJ2Lq_24qVr4bIlkVi6ji8c6tAA=)
Steve King doesn’t want to debate because he doesn’t have an explanation for his six expensive taxpayer-funded trips to visit far-right leaders in Austria over the last six years, or his lack of concern over our growing healthcare crisis. He also doesn’t want J.D.’s message to get out. Steve King practices politics of division and stands in opposition to J.D.’s vision of a healthcare system, an economy, and a government that works for all of us.
This is why your help is so crucial. **We need all the support we can get to make sure we put our message in front of every voter possible before November 6th.** That means putting resources into advertising and an ambitious field program to amplify J.D.'s message as loudly as we can. [**_Help us reach as many voters as possible with a contribution of whatever you can today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2313374/12558254/-1618698251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA5Y2FjZS0zNmMwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkBXjAVwlHyN2mZIeJ2Lq_24qVr4bIlkVi6ji8c6tAA=)
Irene Lin
Campaign Manager
Scholten4Iowa
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2313375/12558255/-1618698251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA5Y2FjZS0zNmMwLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkBXjAVwlHyN2mZIeJ2Lq_24qVr4bIlkVi6ji8c6tAA=)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My brother, Walter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
My younger brother named Walter is brilliant, dynamic, and one of the kindest people I've ever known. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa81e/34a064cc/cd7fe87/70e459e/1016901252/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear Friend, On the campaign trail, I often brag about my five siblings - because they're all extraordinary people. My younger brother named Walter is brilliant, dynamic, and one of the kindest people I've ever known. He also struggles with a drug addiction and has been in and out of prison. Around five years ago, we found out that Walter has bipolar disorder. He was first diagnosed in prison, but he likely first presented in high school. But his mental illness went undiagnosed and untreated because my family lacked health care, the means to address his illness, and the language to discuss it. Unable to access the help he needed, Walter self-medicated. Over the years, he made bad choices to support his drug habit, and he ended up in prison. When Walter was released from prison, he stumbled and eventually returned. The state of Mississippi, much like Georgia, does not offer substantive re-entry programs, and transitioning from prison back into society is impossible to do alone. For Walter, "freedom" meant losing access to counseling and treatment - because, like Georgia, Mississippi has not expanded Medicaid. And when your last address is a prison, "freedom" means it's impossible to find a place to live and even harder to find a place to work. The reality is, in 2016, Georgia had the 4th largest prison population in the country. Most of that population will eventually be released, and the question is this: Do we support and reintegrate them, or do we prepare them to go back - and what will we do to prevent the next generation of Georgians from joining them? I believe if we truly are the Georgia we claim to be, we will welcome them with open arms. We will help them rehabilitate. We will help them reintegrate because we must be a state that believes in redemption. **For me, "criminal justice reform" isn't a slogan - it's personal, and it's a major part of my campaign platform. Help me get Walter's story out to more Georgians by sharing my post on [Facebook](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa81e/34a064cc/cd7fe87/70e459f/1016901252/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/214821605377109/posts/883489951843601/") and [Twitter](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa81e/34a064cc/cd7fe87/70e459c/1016901252/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams/status/1042156804430618625").** I believe in Walter. I believe in Georgia. And I believe that together, we will lead the way forward on this issue. For our families, for our communities, for our future. Thank you for standing with me today. But more importantly, thank you for standing with my brother, Walter - and with all the Walters out there. Sincerely yours, Stacey Abrams
---

subject: Mom Settled It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
Six of my brothers and sisters are attacking me in an ad for my opponent because they hate President Trump. But Mom is on my side. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ecc80ba16b43/mom-settled-it?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **Mom Settled It**
---
|
---
| Last week, I was disappointed to see several of my brothers and sisters in an [ad for my Democrat opponent](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=56df3e5ea0&e=7ca82c1e3d). I wish I could say I was surprised – but the fact is, they’re liberals, they hate President Trump, and not one of them lives in Arizona.

We may be related by blood but like Leftists everywhere, they put political ideology before family. Lenin and Mao would be proud.

My siblings say that I forgot the values we learned around the kitchen table – but Mom disagrees.

When the New York Times called my 85-year old mother for [her reaction](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=a3571d5554&e=7ca82c1e3d), Mom said, “That the Gosar children in the videos did not relate to Paul Gosar or herself.” Mom continued, “I share the same philosophy and policies that Paul does. He’s done one helluva job for Arizona and they love him.”
---
|
---
| I hope Mom’s right.

But you can see there’s nothing The Left won’t do to shut me up, even using my own brothers and sisters to try and defeat me. But I won’t ever back down.

I love my family but I was chosen by the people of Arizona to fight for their values in Washington, not my liberal siblings, Hillary Clinton, or Nancy Pelosi.

One of the reasons The Left is coming after me is that I’ve stood up to the Deep State, to Liberals in Congress – and even my own party. The Special Interests can’t stop me so they want to defeat me.

So I rely on people like you to support our efforts and that’s why I will win in November.

_**Can you rush a donation to our campaign today?**_ It’s just a few weeks until the election and I need the resources to respond to these disgraceful attacks. [Click here to go to my website and make a donation today.](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=bb763f1d54&e=7ca82c1e3d)

Thank you for your friendship and support. And thank you for loving this country as much as I do.
---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
---
| PS – To the six angry Democrat Gosars – see you at Mom and Dad’s house! #MAGA
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=0e7e1c5ad8&e=7ca82c1e3d "Donate")

In 2016, they said President Trump couldn’t do it.

But he did.

They said Senator Johnson couldn’t do it.

But he did.

They won Wisconsin against all odds.

And now, in 2018, I believe WE can do the same! I just need your help today to make sure.

Friend,

I've said it before but I'll say it again now: winning in Wisconsin could be the difference between keeping a Republican majority, and losing the Senate to the Democrats.

And you know which I'd rather have!
[KEEP THE MAJORITY: KEEP WISCONSIN RED >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdO1uqnb90jQc0-Ab18Yh35JqzytQ_eA86ZbzcwOF-nr9bqHgXarQUnlW4ROjYj-5yAFAdb4KvEYn0Ikjo-i49ER2eNEAm7N4GBRrUaUo6p_Fh2NmMBQW6lrd_cSlAG8Mnt93fWww4f2q2lZg6zSHZgzPbSCm3LvnxviTr9SyY5qOESczlMSKlKdAioYMqWdTf3kI6PhHBSngfXHE3nLiY-ts80NKDYtzgBcq1XZa742fkbtwnXmXavWU6awvwQfVKhDr74Su0IrWDOq2e9xzZru02qJQqm7gA6FsiGf2E_V1cSz6DB4qR0kDcQXcyEQlz3cE0TJrDt96gT9dfdTEKk6yty7y8t-eZMyxxd4B-OSui9BL0nttrjletN5ZzRrncKiIp6GLZe1CAlKqp4GasbE%3D)

The truth is, it's not an easy race for many Republicans out there this year.

Democrats are motivated. They're well funded. And they're coming after all of us with everything they've got.

We've seen it here in Wisconsin already! Liberal donors have swooped in from out of state, attempting to buy this race for Tammy Baldwin.

But I'm NOT going to let that happen.

**And with your help, friend, we can make sure Wisconsin turns the Senate red in 2018, like we turned the state red in 2016 for Senator Ron Johnson and President Donald Trump!**

But we don't have much time.

With just 45 days until the election, we have to start ramping up our efforts so we can win.

We just have to put in the work now.

Please, stand up for our Wisconsin values and chip in today: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=46Ur4KTHSz_atX8hUjkQwYbpHtZKpi4PlkLEgb643Zl2pWSkCWcU4SqQupT4pQ-rhX-iPA6V0fzAE2utbv00ltAiHTpzxiMPHkZ9R5KVAHzfTbia9hgeuI-scs2Gkl22SRzLxKRqbjWDcU6ZkLPz-erSNfWDrLq1XLh_bkkoHivWoPJKRQMu5cVFTXmErBtatXM2Wqs4wBVQ_g_jhb8LItLJk46wI3z1AVeSnZ8XzO_PGT4Urkd2zphJlm4MyaUdXM-UjdMvk7-CsyZMu1Zzn27BqmAb_udG11hk04g0tsJq6UfVrpfxM_Vd51o3SuUx8bf_Ybm_UHaAf1b97XLmmRZineGWeWKfALgHdjJ4HLQuPdvONH7XTCdBaGg7lnNPtvIVXlJwsADu9cK13cW9g0mTAbrWX1vm1eU4fX0DMSY%3D)**

-Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=FzPgNwUWW3rWrMn1AdCEn_AxDLfN4uNpyxsbvahNNOe5AV7jB_DJUMNGgMIXr30uE1O-D-u1OTCSQTV4vb0YQ3BAQHeEc26Q__uckQocrFNjdPCkWZai1oLM2z98fSYpyITGegbmA4McBGceQ5pt1z77jHyC3Ls2ZeflnFx58usij4rtpJ4vTaiLcZgYaYxv_IFSJF6sppSfjBX4JidKVB9hKwUttlpFF71gccynzzuCaM8IancGDXVMEq_V2jHm). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdLctKblt3CApcMZI7d16m_7h_l43iRnWoM1stClVLoi490z8Al_Ga_61MQxpqD4dc6nZlxM7I8JMFDCVp8_xyyMZO_-FoshT7CXt1P9ono5WI4cIAWmphEaNcgdhodeyidQzhr__WQX2aA7yH2whE6Ct85B1asVfo71GB-z0LMgnZrOd1k929RTv5TEI-cwLUZAAKBf7DRobDw6Iw9VWRojbsVRWAjYrjMDF3cETddfoUXBTFbhaubNpGNkySEoQp_dJqmuSEHyATMEizSS9l0AAi1YpFUOBZOyyiIvXC_VEnpg2GdjtmkfzgUHlJTh1FMrpgEPS4FQE2XtGGuvJCmzZjgj4nu0TtnLGX2_HVIZN) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdLctKblt3CApcMZI7d16m_7sXApf9agS8YdxCQOwrQRYquDlg6F3CyZury5380pwOpLEo-yF01JkIPUS8TESjsVS8626W55e5fjmiFOKeQnGtCB6cVZy7csCoVCe5f3HQ8GjQDE96-0BYclr4wOn4NFGO6DhrUp9yQuOYF06U5KicfCRIJPZnBDRzL6A_mF4kp5O8Nc1e86P8xW6pbCcQ2rfvFvJTliGqMfKz8Kacl41Exkk-ykZFc9IrCQd28YG4qaj7CPPYhM4CBbhD44Dtr66FMMftpNkSofB4INwPT65BD8w1ibL4sVOEdEQMQ9cDPVv2tDrISWqDHAu947fT5l6lf3A9NdiquR-e1T_7EsJ) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdFpp1zXPMt84_B3v1htynmASBn2u2RkSYUIZlA-AlI6EoU1B0r5cojVFIiQAjVtUWnAVRfUpfCkOV4aZKwVBAQREvaeGWceCSmTcE1DbfDlcGovUblQUWBQV0LxUmN7DmRTCAj1pqYtzhmGwdsNq0h-jAgzahCS1d6evVIoqkwYbb3QkmjgRv4zqEAD7nQZMNt4lxAmmW1kwV4mTghduT-h-S4ZtvddK-MI0u1K0_Y1AVA28L_hAjOzuTZuKQQtXeQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdHOHJ-KnlSQzdKg19yIdS71dEifu8no1sS-6pnaQQEJOe_KlBPpbSL5_dLyXdfK1_1dro013XoATvXXbOLihWsrBA8iRGVLq5-8WoGEct0jwZP4wHTSph8rigruZXriK_tX7YPIWC4Rczwb6THuCzXsS1RaDs9dqZnISoHN3xwOMfRlR5xqgUOv0Z2GcMH14DJVTu-CUoUzuMhT10Oeqwx023XOLkYsISfg6zaujk-ZjXPXFu8GzHpGys3VlxqK-Sw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdN3aKCkTn9LfNqqboUarKOvn-Yr2gJPRIuzEX3xlMR_IBZSpx6CAT3xHuFNQk8Pn0Pj4rLiDQpc2eRdcP6Avvipzb2K4OpkqrJ87rmJNrHKSJxDVRQMoVY-d57eKVsNYH_skou9w5nwtDA0s7AJpXG5jtbVx2wLkE1PeTtcNCjGHvY1M6N-ZAFIB46E_ijlQ0CVSgHWdwT1uDIVja74OTLR5KF7AF_lpUzbwAbk01NJKdLGMde71r83owdx5hD0M0A%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=wpPkdTOiA3cj_GY9CNtKdLctKblt3CApcMZI7d16m_7em17m4CSzXjQVbfS7Bq4ChMd-vnL9QRowS9k5_huzi-hBggs3IeWdUXt3E21NJ3-q24FdYth1LLoYVSgiXEdkWrw61HJyHMA7UPDUHDQpYUq90bVzlbkrirdiUjL1pzCujWgX_X0-md_T7bCZTKH1dMWBc__zEsd2IrXJyjdpCQBl7sKRg9PHYi4e86NopdmJbW5TkhSisNAjKMWxaH8f2kROxYOlWRcpoAVup6PkVhCnKT4ExUcyqo2DDMcE5dDqYDhnfBuQB7-zu_vOcn7qLpAjqPDDNwdGprt6zoa4Eh2vj0lRy9IX01sSYJm2lCvi9tt7-NYZm5-iBzA2lleJeIH-T-zEY3M1XKQOPtzLgg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=FzPgNwUWW3rWrMn1AdCEn_AxDLfN4uNpyxsbvahNNOe5AV7jB_DJUMNGgMIXr30uE1O-D-u1OTCSQTV4vb0YQ3BAQHeEc26Q__uckQocrFNjdPCkWZai1oLM2z98fSYpyITGegbmA4McBGceQ5pt1z77jHyC3Ls2ZeflnFx58usij4rtpJ4vTaiLcZgYaYxv_IFSJF6sppSfjBX4JidKVB9hKwUttlpFF71gccynzzuCaM8IancGDXVMEq_V2jHm) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9294429092bd4ff486c999eca83124b7&_e=FzPgNwUWW3rWrMn1AdCEn_AxDLfN4uNpyxsbvahNNOe5AV7jB_DJUMNGgMIXr30uE1O-D-u1OTCSQTV4vb0YQ3BAQHeEc26Q__uckQocrFNjdPCkWZai1oLM2z98fSYpyITGegbmA4McBGceQ5pt1z77jHyC3Ls2ZeflnFx58usij4rtpJ4vTaiLcZgYaYxv_IFSJF6sppSfjBX4JidKVB9hKwUttlpFF71gccynzzuCaM8IancGDXVMEq_V2jHm) to unsubscribe. Friend, In 2016, they said President Trump couldn’t do it. But he did. They said Senator Johnson couldn’t do it. But he did. They won Wisconsin against all odds. And now, in 2018, I believe WE can do the same! I just need your help today to make sure. I can’t do it without you, friend, and we’re running out of time. -Leah \--------------forwarded message below-------------- Friend, I've said it before but I'll say it again now: winning in Wisconsin could be the difference between keeping a Republican majority, and losing the Senate to the Democrats. And you know which I'd rather have! The truth is, it's not an easy race for many Republicans out there this year. Democrats are motivated. They're well funded. And they're coming after all of us with everything they've got. We've seen it here in Wisconsin already! Liberal donors have swooped in from out of state, attempting to buy this race for Tammy Baldwin. But I'm NOT going to let that happen. And with your help, friend, we can make sure Wisconsin turns the Senate red in 2018, like we turned the state red in 2016 for Senator Ron Johnson and President Donald Trump! But we don't have much time. With just 45 days until the election, we have to start ramping up our efforts so we can win. I know the left wants us to think it's impossible, friend, but I know if we work together, we can win bigger than ever imagined. We just have to put in the work now. Please, stand up for our Wisconsin values and chip in today: -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

| | Hi friend, **You may have seen some negative ads about me on TV lately -- but what you may not have heard is that the money for those negative ads is coming from Donald Trump.** Just two days ago, Donald Trump held a fundraiser in his Bedminster resort, funneling money straight into the Republican Governors Association, who are using it to pay for the attack ads against us. **My opponent, Mayor Allan Fung, tries to hide it but he 's a Trump candidate.** Fung supported Trump's candidacy during the 2016 elections and continues to support Trump now. **And now we can see that that support goes the other way, too.** **[Click here and contribute $31 or as much as you can to stand up against Donald Trump's influence in Rhode Island!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a015/5e076a9e/54ea495d/14425fe9/4062713552/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contrast-raimondo-fung?refcode=180924")** When President Trump attacked the women who have spoken out about Judge Kavanaugh's alleged history of sexual assault, Mayor Fung was silent. When the President attacked health care, Mayor Fung couldn't be found. And when the President sided with the NRA against doing anything to make our communities safer, Allan Fung said nothing. Even after the Parkland massacre, Allan Fung opposed any limitations on semi-automatic weapons. **[Can you contribute $31 or as much as you can right now to stand up for a better Rhode Island?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a015/5e076a9e/54ea495d/14425fe9/4062713552/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contrast-raimondo-fung?refcode=180924")** Many thanks, Gina
